## Shape & Geometry
- Amazon.com: Strain Relief Clamp: Secure your cords and cables with strain relief clamps built to withstand pulling, stretching, and sideways motion. Easy installation for quick setup.
- Strain Relief Fittings | McMaster-Carr: Choose from our selection of strain relief fittings, including plastic submersible cord grips, cord grips, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.
- Cable Glands, Strain Reliefs & Cord Grips - Mouser: Cable Glands, Strain Reliefs & Cord Grips are available at Mouser Electronics. Mouser offers inventory, pricing, & datasheets for Cable Glands, Strain Reliefs & Cord Grips.
- HC-B-ZS - Strain relief clamp - 1685330 | Phoenix Contact: Strain relief clamps contact inserts of series: B-, BB-, D 40, D 64, DD and HV, lateral cable exit
- Cable Strain Relief Connectors, Clamps & Grips - RSP Supply: Cord grips and cable glands are among the most common forms of strain relief. These versatile components can accommodate a wide range of cable diameters and are easy to install - simply clamp or fasten the device around the cable at the entry point of the enclosure or connector housing.

## Dimensions
- Shop cord strain relief clamp - Amazon.com Official Site: Browse & discover thousands of brands. Read customer reviews & find best sellers. Find deals and low prices on cord strain relief clamp at Amazon.com
- Amazon.com: Strain Relief Clamp: Secure your cords and cables with strain relief clamps built to withstand pulling, stretching, and sideways motion. Easy installation for quick setup.
- Cable Clamps | McMaster-Carr: Choose from our selection of cable clamps, including plastic loop clamps, vibration-damping loop clamps, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.
- Cable Strain Relief Connectors, Clamps & Grips - RSP Supply: Shop cable strain relief connectors, clamps, and grips in a variety of sizes and materials. Maintain NEMA 4 seals while protecting cables from pull-out, bending, and mechanical stress.
- Strain Reliefs Cable
build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 20, 2)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(4).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=2).rect(10, 18).extrude(2)
STEP 4: Create mounting holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-25, -9).circle(2).extrude(2)
STEP 5: Create mounting holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(25, -9).circle(2).extrude(2)
STEP 6: Add hinge feature — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=1.5).rect(30, 1.5).extrude(1)
STEP 7: Chamfer edges — .edges("|Z").chamfer(0.5)
